hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A git commit just landed on this project. Per CLAUDE.md, every commit on a dev branch must be paired with a new entry at the top of prd/<branch-name>.md. If you did not stage the log update with this commit, run git show HEAD --stat to confirm what landed, then prepend a new entry to the log using the format in CLAUDE.md (## Progress Update as of YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM Pacific, *(Most recent updates at top)*, ### Summary, ### Detail, ### Potential concerns, ---) and either amend or do a follow-up commit. After updating, tell the user you updated the log."}}'
